name_cn:
Top Quality
(Box Included)🌟Hobo Three-in-One Faux Fur Bag
The autumn/winter vibe is just one faux fur bag away❄️ This bag comes with a detachable faux fur shoulder strap and chain, adding a touch of sexiness when worn as an armpit bag. It also features a detachable long strap, allowing those who love a sporty-sexy look to crossbody it for an effortless silhouette. Highly functional, a winter essential!!
Size: L22*H18*W6cm
Style: 1BC204
